passage_title: Prison: The Solution or the Problem?

sentences.sentence: In the Netherlands and parts of the USA such as Johnson County, a move towards rehabilitation of offenders and decreasing crime has seen a reduction in incarceration rates.
sentences.translation: 在荷兰以及美国约翰逊县等部分地区，转向罪犯改造和减少犯罪的做法，带来了监禁率下降。

structure.text: In the Netherlands and parts of the USA such as Johnson County
a move towards rehabilitation of offenders and decreasing crime
has seen a reduction in incarceration rates

difficult_points: 主语中心是 a move，towards 后并列 rehabilitation 与 decreasing。
has seen 是拟人化表达，表示这种政策转向伴随监禁率下降。

sentences.sentence: Bucking this trend, the UK's prison population has increased by an average rate of 3.6% per year since 1993.
sentences.translation: 英国却逆此趋势而行，自1993年以来，其监狱人口平均每年增长3.6%。

structure.text: Bucking this trend
the UK's prison population
has increased by an average rate of 3.6% per year
since 1993

difficult_points: Bucking ... 的逻辑主语是 the UK's prison population，表示逆势而行。
现在完成时与 since 1993 搭配；by 表示增长幅度。

expressions.text: increase by an average rate of

sentences.sentence: As the situation currently stands, England's and Wales' incarceration rate is 148 per 100,000 compared to 98 in France, 82 in the Netherlands and 79 in Germany.
sentences.translation: 就目前情况而言，英格兰和威尔士每10万人中有148人被监禁，相比之下法国为98人、荷兰82人、德国79人。

structure.text: As the situation currently stands
England's and Wales' incarceration rate
compared to 98 in France, 82 in the Netherlands and 79 in Germany

difficult_points: As the situation stands 意为就现状而言。
compared to ... 是过去分词短语，后三个国家省略 incarceration rate is。

sentences.sentence: Without a shadow of a doubt, out of all European countries, the UK has adopted the most hardline approach to offenders.
sentences.translation: 毫无疑问，在所有欧洲国家中，英国对罪犯采取了最强硬的做法。

structure.text: Without a shadow of a doubt
out of all European countries
the UK
has adopted the most hardline approach to offenders

difficult_points: Without a shadow of a doubt 是强化确信的固定表达。
out of ... 限定最高级 the most hardline 的比较范围。

expressions.text: without a shadow of a doubt

sentences.sentence: The trend towards imposing prison sentences on offenders in the UK is made to seem all the more harsh since the Dutch Justice Ministry is actively in the process of systematically closing down prisons.
sentences.translation: 由于荷兰司法部正在积极、系统地关闭监狱，英国对罪犯判处监禁的趋势显得更加严厉。

structure.text: The trend towards imposing prison sentences on offenders in the UK
is made to seem all the more harsh
since the Dutch Justice Ministry is actively in the process of systematically closing down prisons

difficult_points: towards 后接动名词 imposing，修饰 trend。
is made to seem 是被动使役结构；since 引导原因从句。

sentences.sentence: In the period between 2010-2015, 28 prisons were closed in total.
sentences.translation: 2010至2015年期间，总计有28所监狱关闭。

structure.text: In the period between 2010-2015
28 prisons
were closed in total

difficult_points: were closed 是被动语态。
原文 between 2010-2015 混用 between 与连字符，通常写 between 2010 and 2015，须保留。

sentences.sentence: If anything, the Dutch reform of the prison system has been accelerating at a phenomenal pace, with 19 of the prisons being shut down in 2014 alone.
sentences.translation: 事实上，荷兰监狱制度改革正以惊人速度加快，仅2014年就关闭了其中19所监狱。

structure.text: If anything
the Dutch reform of the prison system
has been accelerating at a phenomenal pace
with 19 of the prisons being shut down in 2014 alone

difficult_points: If anything 在此表示“甚至可以说、事实上”，不是普通条件句。
with + 名词 + being done 构成独立结构，补充2014年的数据。

sentences.sentence: As would be expected, closures of prisons in the Netherlands have led to a drop in the numbers of incarcerated offenders.
sentences.translation: 正如预期，荷兰关闭监狱导致被监禁罪犯人数下降。

structure.text: As would be expected
closures of prisons in the Netherlands
have led to a drop in the numbers of incarcerated offenders

difficult_points: As would be expected 是省略主语的评论从句。
incarcerated 是过去分词形容词，修饰 offenders。

sentences.sentence: This is also largely due to the fact that those convicted are choosing electronic tagging instead of incarceration.
sentences.translation: 这在很大程度上也是因为被定罪者选择电子监控，而不是入狱。

structure.text: This
is also largely due to the fact
that those convicted are choosing electronic tagging instead of incarceration
convicted

difficult_points: that 从句说明 fact 内容；those convicted 指被定罪的人。
instead of 连接电子监控与监禁两种处置方式。

sentences.sentence: However, there is more to these statistics than meets the eye.
sentences.translation: 然而，这些统计数字背后还有表面看不出来的内涵。

structure.text: there is more to these statistics
than meets the eye

difficult_points: there is more to ... than ... 表示事情比表面所见更复杂。
meet the eye 是习语，表示映入眼帘、表面可见。

expressions.text: there is more to ... than meets the eye

sentences.sentence: Defying all expectations of the pro-incarceration lobbyists, crime rates in the Netherlands are also actually decreasing in direct proportion to the closure of prisons.
sentences.translation: 出乎支持监禁的游说者所料，荷兰犯罪率实际上也随着监狱关闭而成比例下降。

structure.text: Defying all expectations of the pro-incarceration lobbyists
crime rates in the Netherlands
are also actually decreasing
in direct proportion to the closure of prisons

difficult_points: Defying ... 的逻辑主语是 crime rates 的下降事实。
in direct proportion to 表示与监狱关闭成直接比例变化。

sentences.sentence: With such statistics laid bare for all to see, many are now beginning to question the validity of incarceration as a method of reforming offenders.
sentences.translation: 这些统计数据清楚摆在众人面前，许多人开始质疑监禁作为改造罪犯手段的有效性。

structure.text: With such statistics laid bare for all to see
many
are now beginning to question the validity of incarceration
as a method of reforming offenders

difficult_points: with + 名词 + 过去分词构成背景结构；laid bare 表示完全公开。
as ... 说明 incarceration 被评价的角色。

sentences.sentence: All the more so since the average prison place costs the taxpayer £37,648 per year - a hefty sum for a service that fails to deliver, especially since there are vastly cheaper and more effective methods to deal with offenders.
sentences.translation: 尤其如此，因为每个监狱名额每年要花纳税人37,648英镑——对于一项未能奏效的服务而言，这是笔巨款，何况还有便宜得多且更有效的罪犯处置方法。

structure.text: All the more so
since the average prison place costs the taxpayer £37,648 per year
a hefty sum for a service
that fails to deliver
especially since there are vastly cheaper and more effective methods to deal with offenders

difficult_points: All the more so 是承接上句的省略表达，意为更有理由质疑。
a hefty sum 与 £37,648 同位；that 修饰 service。
fail to deliver 表示服务未达到效果，第二个 since 进一步说明原因。

sentences.sentence: Allowing offenders to be tagged electronically rather than be incarcerated would save around £35 million per year for every 1000 convicted offenders.
sentences.translation: 让罪犯接受电子监控而非入狱，每1000名罪犯每年可节省约3500万英镑。

structure.text: Allowing offenders to be tagged electronically rather than be incarcerated
would save around £35 million per year
for every 1000 convicted offenders

difficult_points: Allowing ... 是动名词短语作主语。
rather than 连接两个被动不定式 to be tagged 与 be incarcerated。

sentences.sentence: Serving a probation or community service order would also be 12 times less costly than the average prison placement for an offender.
sentences.translation: 执行缓刑或社区服务令的成本，也会比平均每名罪犯的监禁费用低12倍。

structure.text: Serving a probation or community service order
would also be 12 times less costly
than the average prison placement for an offender

difficult_points: Serving ... 是动名词短语作主语。
12 times less costly than 是原文倍数表达，表示成本显著更低。

sentences.sentence: More tellingly, a decreased incidence of relapse into criminal behaviour when offenders receive a community sentence, rather than a custodial one, has been revealed in re-offending statistics issued by the UK Ministry of Justice.
sentences.translation: 更能说明问题的是，英国司法部发布的再犯统计显示，罪犯接受社区判决而非监禁判决时，重新犯罪的发生率会降低。

structure.text: a decreased incidence of relapse into criminal behaviour
when offenders receive a community sentence, rather than a custodial one
has been revealed
in re-offending statistics issued by the UK Ministry of Justice
issued by the UK Ministry of Justice

difficult_points: 主语中心是 incidence，when 从句说明再犯率降低的条件。
one 代替 sentence；issued by ... 修饰 statistics。

sentences.sentence: There is definitely an argument that serving a prison term tends to create rather than alleviate the problem of crime.
sentences.translation: 确实存在一种观点：服刑往往不是缓解犯罪问题，反而会制造这一问题。

structure.text: There is definitely an argument
that serving a prison term tends to create rather than alleviate the problem of crime
serving a prison term

difficult_points: that 从句说明 argument 内容；serving ... 在从句中作主语。
create rather than alleviate 对比监禁的负面与预期效果。

sentences.sentence: As a Conservative white paper concluded in 1990, 'We know that prison is an expensive way of making bad people worse.'Interestingly, the report also argued that there should be a range of community-based sentences which would be cheaper and more effective alternatives to prison.
sentences.translation: 正如一份保守党白皮书在1990年得出的结论：“我们知道，监狱是一种让坏人变得更坏的昂贵方式。”有意思的是，该报告还主张应提供一系列社区判决，作为比监禁更便宜、更有效的替代方案。

structure.text: As a Conservative white paper concluded in 1990
We know
that prison is an expensive way of making bad people worse
Interestingly, the report also argued
that there should be a range of community-based sentences
which would be cheaper and more effective alternatives to prison

difficult_points: make + 宾语 + 形容词构成复合宾语，表示使坏人更坏。
第二个 that 从句作 argued 的宾语，which 修饰 sentences。
原文句号与 Interestingly 之间没有空格，因此两句必须作为同一 Block 保留。

sentences.sentence: Quite apart from the cost and relative ineffectiveness of incarceration is the short-sightedness of imposing a custodial sentence in the first place.
sentences.translation: 且不论监禁的成本和相对低效，首先判处监禁本身就是短视的。

structure.text: Quite apart from the cost and relative ineffectiveness of incarceration
is
the short-sightedness of imposing a custodial sentence in the first place

difficult_points: 句首长状语导致倒装，真正主语是 the short-sightedness ...。
of imposing ... 说明 short-sightedness 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: A punitive system of incarceration presupposes that the prisoner needs to be punished for bad behaviour.
sentences.translation: 惩罚性的监禁制度预先假定，囚犯需要因不良行为受到惩罚。

structure.text: A punitive system of incarceration
presupposes
that the prisoner needs to be punished for bad behaviour

difficult_points: that 从句作 presupposes 的宾语。
needs to be punished 是被动不定式结构。

sentences.sentence: Since the prisoner is considered answerable for their behaviour, it is believed that they are also completely responsible for their actions.
sentences.translation: 由于囚犯被认为应对自己的行为负责，人们也就相信他们应对自己的行动承担全部责任。

structure.text: Since the prisoner is considered answerable for their behaviour
it is believed
that they are also completely responsible for their actions

difficult_points: Since 引导原因；be answerable for 表示须对某事负责。
it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语；they 以中性复数形式回指 prisoner。

sentences.sentence: Such an approach overlooks social and economic factors that can play an integral role in the incidence of crime.
sentences.translation: 这种做法忽视了可能在犯罪发生中发挥关键作用的社会和经济因素。

structure.text: Such an approach
overlooks social and economic factors
that can play an integral role in the incidence of crime

difficult_points: that 从句修饰 factors。
the incidence of crime 指犯罪的发生率或发生现象。

sentences.sentence: Such an oversight only serves to perpetuate crime and punish offenders who need help rather than a penal sentence.
sentences.translation: 这种忽视只会使犯罪延续，并惩罚那些真正需要帮助而非刑罚的罪犯。

structure.text: Such an oversight
only serves to perpetuate crime and punish offenders
who need help rather than a penal sentence

difficult_points: serve to 后接两个并列动词 perpetuate 和 punish。
who 修饰 offenders；rather than 对比其需要的是帮助还是刑罚。

sentences.sentence: It would do no harm for the UK to look to the Netherlands for an example in reducing crime through addressing social problems as a key to reducing incarceration.
sentences.translation: 英国借鉴荷兰把解决社会问题作为减少犯罪和监禁关键的做法，并无坏处。

structure.text: It would do no harm
for the UK to look to the Netherlands for an example
in reducing crime through addressing social problems
as a key to reducing incarceration

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，for the UK to ... 是真正主语。
look to ... for an example 表示向某方借鉴；through 后接动名词。

expressions.text: It would do no harm to

sentences.sentence: In the Netherlands, the focus is on deterring crime by investing in social services rather than seeking purely to punish the offender.
sentences.translation: 在荷兰，政策重点是通过投资社会服务来遏制犯罪，而非一味寻求惩罚罪犯。

structure.text: the focus
is on deterring crime
by investing in social services
rather than seeking purely to punish the offender

difficult_points: is on 后接动名词 deterring，说明重点所在。
rather than 对比社会投资与单纯惩罚两条路径。

sentences.sentence: In addition, those who do offend are helped with rehabilitation programmes.
sentences.translation: 此外，真正犯罪的人也会通过改造项目获得帮助。

structure.text: those
who do offend
are helped with rehabilitation programmes

difficult_points: who 从句修饰 those；do 强调他们确实犯罪。
are helped with 是被动语态，说明帮助方式。

sentences.sentence: Overlooking the social circumstances of the offender can also be detrimental to children's welfare, especially if a mother is convicted and given a custodial sentence.
sentences.translation: 忽视罪犯的社会处境也可能损害儿童福利，尤其是在母亲被定罪并判处监禁时。

structure.text: Overlooking the social circumstances of the offender
can also be detrimental to children's welfare
especially if a mother is convicted and given a custodial sentence

difficult_points: Overlooking ... 是动名词短语作主语。
if 从句中 is convicted 与 given 共用助动词 is，均为被动。

sentences.sentence: Often child care arrangements are not in place when custodial sentences are handed down to mothers caring for children.
sentences.translation: 对抚养孩子的母亲判处监禁时，儿童照料安排往往尚未到位。

structure.text: child care arrangements
are not in place
when custodial sentences are handed down to mothers caring for children
caring for children

difficult_points: be in place 表示安排已落实；否定表示尚未准备好。
are handed down 是判决被宣告；caring ... 修饰 mothers。

sentences.sentence: In fact, research suggests that more than half of the women who go to court are not expecting a custodial sentence, leading to provisions made for the children being haphazard at best.
sentences.translation: 事实上，研究表明，超过一半出庭的女性没有预料到会被判监禁，导致为孩子作出的安排充其量也只是仓促零乱。

structure.text: research suggests
that more than half of the women who go to court are not expecting a custodial sentence
who go to court
leading to provisions made for the children being haphazard at best

difficult_points: that 从句作 suggests 的宾语，who 修饰 women。
leading to 表示结果；made for ... 修饰 provisions，being haphazard 是结果状态。

sentences.sentence: The number of children who fall foul of the custodial system in this way totals a staggering 17,000 per year.
sentences.translation: 每年以这种方式受监禁制度牵连的儿童人数高达惊人的17,000人。

structure.text: The number of children
who fall foul of the custodial system in this way
totals a staggering 17,000 per year

difficult_points: who 修饰 children。
fall foul of 表示与制度发生冲突或受其不利影响。

sentences.sentence: Worse still, figures show that adult children of imprisoned mothers are more likely to be convicted of a crime than adult children of imprisoned fathers.
sentences.translation: 更糟的是，数据显示，被监禁母亲的成年子女比被监禁父亲的成年子女更可能被判犯罪。

structure.text: figures show
that adult children of imprisoned mothers are more likely to be convicted of a crime
than adult children of imprisoned fathers

difficult_points: that 从句作 show 的宾语；more likely ... than 构成概率比较。
imprisoned 是过去分词形容词，分别修饰 mothers 和 fathers。

expressions.text: be more likely to be convicted

sentences.sentence: Viewing the offender and their crime in isolation and disregarding all other social and environmental factors is therefore mistaken, if not downright morally reprehensible.
sentences.translation: 因此，把罪犯及其罪行孤立看待、无视其他社会和环境因素，即便不能说在道德上应受强烈谴责，至少也是错误的。

structure.text: Viewing the offender and their crime in isolation and disregarding all other social and environmental factors
is therefore mistaken
if not downright morally reprehensible

difficult_points: Viewing 与 disregarding 是并列动名词，共同作主语。
if not 在此不是普通条件，而是递进表达“即使不算……也……”，downright 加强批评。

sentences.sentence: All evidence would seem to point to a much needed shake-up of the English penal system.
sentences.translation: 所有证据似乎都指向一个结论：英格兰刑罚制度亟须彻底改革。

structure.text: All evidence
would seem to point to
a much needed shake-up of the English penal system

difficult_points: would seem to 以较委婉方式表达结论。
shake-up 指大幅度重组改革；原文 much needed 未加连字符，须保留。

sentences.sentence: As things stand, there are too many losers and no identifiable winners.
sentences.translation: 照目前情况看，受损者太多，却找不到明确的受益者。

structure.text: As things stand
there are too many losers and no identifiable winners

difficult_points: As things stand 表示按当前状况判断。
there be 后并列 losers 与 winners，并形成鲜明对比。

sentences.sentence: It was Dostoevsky who said: 'The degree of civilisation in a society is revealed by entering its prisons.'
sentences.translation: 陀思妥耶夫斯基曾说：“一个社会的文明程度，可以通过走进它的监狱来揭示。”

structure.text: It was Dostoevsky who said
The degree of civilisation in a society
is revealed
by entering its prisons

difficult_points: It was ... who ... 是强调句，突出说话者。
引语中 by + 动名词说明判断文明程度的方式。

sentences.sentence: Maybe we would do better to go one step further and amend his quotation to 'The degree of civilisation in a society is revealed by not having prisons and instead by addressing social issues in society itself.'
sentences.translation: 或许我们最好再进一步，把这句话改为：“一个社会的文明程度，体现在它没有监狱，而是着手解决社会自身的问题。”

structure.text: Maybe we would do better
to go one step further
and amend his quotation to
The degree of civilisation in a society is revealed by not having prisons and instead by addressing social issues in society itself

difficult_points: would do better to 表示最好做某事；go 与 amend 是并列不定式。
引语中 by not having 与 instead by addressing 并列，说明文明程度的体现方式。
